title: senecio iranicus
intro: Senecio iranicus, also known as Iranian ragwort or Iranian groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio iranicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin problems. Herbal preparations of Senecio iranicus, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by boiling the leaves and roots of the plant in water to utilize its medicinal properties.
